arts.ttl: Strasbourg predicted XI v Lyon: Habib Diarra out, Andrey Santos to captain RCSA
arts.sum: Habib Diarra will miss RC Strasbourg Alsace’s game against Olympique Lyonnais tonight, meaning that Chelsea loanee Andrey Santos will not only start but also captain the team in his absence. …

arts.ttl: Lyon predicted XI v Strasbourg: Malick Fofana and Saël Kumbedi out
arts.sum: Olympique Lyonnais will be without Malick Fofana and Saël Kumbedi as they travel to face RC Strasbourg Alsace on Friday night. Fofana suffered a sprained knee whilst on international duty…

arts.ttl: How Liam Rosenior has RC Strasbourg chasing Champions League with ideal Chelsea blueprint
arts.sum: Former Hull and Derby manager Liam Rosenior is enjoying a great first season in France at the Alsace club bought by Chelsea owners BlueCo as his squad chase a spot in Europe

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool want Rayan Cherki with Lyon star amongst Europe's best
arts.sum: Rayan Cherki has been tipped for greatness since gaining the reputation as one of the greatest ever prospects to progress through Lyon’s famed academy. Nabil Fekir, Karim Benzema,...

arts.ttl: Are tensions between anti and pro-BlueCo Strasbourg supporters easing?
arts.sum: For the first 15 minutes of each RC Strasbourg Alsace game this season, the ultras have remained silent in protest at the BlueCo ownership. The UB90 have made it clear…

arts.ttl: Why Lyon’s Thiago Almada could return for brief stint at Botafogo
arts.sum: From Botafogo to Olympique Lyonnais, then back to Botafogo and then finally, back to Lyon once more: that could be the path taken by Thiago Almada (23). The Argentina international…
